note: Primary annual-review source for Pfizer business overview and 2025 performance context.

note: Market-cap source used for the May 2026 registry snapshot.

note: Secondary financial data source used to cross-check 2025 revenue and net income.

title: COMIRNATY Product Detail
note: Official Pfizer product page for Comirnaty.

title: COMIRNATY
note: Regulatory source for Comirnaty indication and approval context.

title: ELIQUIS Product Detail
note: Official Pfizer product page for Eliquis.

title: WHO COVID-19 Technology Access Pool
note: Public-health source for voluntary licensing, patent pooling, and technology-transfer mechanisms for COVID-19 health products.

title: mRNA Technology Transfer Programme
note: Source for regional mRNA manufacturing capacity and technology-transfer enablers.

title: RDKit
note: Open-source cheminformatics toolkit used as an enabling infrastructure source for open drug discovery.

title: Datamol
note: Open-source molecular processing and featurization toolkit relevant to decentralized drug-discovery workflows.

title: Open Source Drug Discovery: Highly Potent Antimalarial Compounds Derived from the Tres Cantos Arylpyrroles
note: Peer-reviewed open-source drug-discovery example used to ground the broader open-pharma concept.
